results.title: Tips Music Q1 Net Profit Up 4.49% To ₹43.70 Crore; Revenue Also Rises
results.description: Tips Music Limited reported a standalone net profit of ₹43.70 crore for the quarter ended June 30, 2026, marking a 4.49% increase year-on-year. Total income for the quarter also grew by 19.82% to ₹112.34 crore

results.title: AME Elite targets seven-year development of RM1.3b Selangor i-Park@Coalfields
results.description: SUNGAI BULOH: AME Elite Consortium Bhd expects its RM1.3 billion i-Park@Coalfields industrial park in Selangor to be fully developed over the next seven years, with completion targeted around 2033. Group CEO Dylan Tan Teck Eng said the 151.2-acre development would be rolled out over seven to eight years, describing that as the typical development cycle [...]
